//: ALTERNATIVE: native HTTP hook — zero client script. Claude Code POSTs its raw hook JSON straight to the ingest endpoint. Trade-off vs the shell hook: NO identity enrichment (no user_email/org), NO idempotency event_id, and the payload is Claude Code's shape (prompt/session_id/cwd/transcript_path line up with our ingest contract; prompt_id/permission_mode are ignored; no hostname). Deliver the token via env; only allow-listed env vars are interpolated into headers.
